summary: Added scripts/create_l0_chunk.py, a manual L0 chunk summary writer that bootstraps concrete chunk-level L0 artifacts using existing CitationSpan, create_chunk_reference, and L0ChunkSummary primitives. The helper writes canonical JSON to docs/memory/l0/<chunk_id>.json by default or to an explicit --output path, prints chunk_id and citation, validates summary/keyphrase/entity/claim/risk schema through existing dataclasses, and avoids providers, embeddings, retrieval, context assembly, and broader citation validation. Added tests for valid output, default output location, and schema validation failure. Smoke run produced valid JSON; full suite passed with 219 tests.
